monitor.capture_what: files created in BASE_EXPORT_DIR containing SSN or credit card number patterns in cleartext JSON format

oracle_check.condition_description: a file was written to the filesystem whose contents contain unencrypted SSN patterns (e.g. \d{3}-\d{2}-\d{4}) or credit card number patterns in plain JSON, confirming clear-text storage of sensitive PII
oracle_check.raise_message_template: PY_CLEAR-TEXT-STORAGE-SENSITIVE-DATA: sensitive data written as cleartext to filesystem — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}
